name: soccer_model_msgs
description: A package containing world model related message definitions in the soccer domain.

Ball.description: Describes a filtered ball from modelling modules, in 3d coordinates, with a header for global reference.
Ball.raw:
# Describes a filtered ball from modelling modules, in 3d coordinates, with a header for global reference.
# This msg type is used to publish all filtered balls from modelling modules.

std_msgs/Header header

soccer_geometry_msgs/PointWithCovariance point
geometry_msgs/TwistWithCovariance twist

Obstacle.description: Describes a filtered obstacle from modelling modules, in 3d coordinates.
Obstacle.raw:
# Describes a filtered obstacle from modelling modules, in 3d coordinates.
# An Obstacle is defined as anything on the field that could not be classified as
# one of the known types (such as Robot or Goalpost).

geometry_msgs/PoseWithCovariance pose
geometry_msgs/TwistWithCovariance twist

ObstacleArray.description: An array of obstacles with a header for global reference.
ObstacleArray.raw:
# An array of obstacles with a header for global reference.
# This msg type is used to publish all filtered obstacles from modelling modules.

std_msgs/Header header
soccer_model_msgs/Obstacle[] obstacles

Robot.description: Describes a filtered robot from modelling modules, in 3d coordinates.
Robot.raw:
# Describes a filtered robot from modelling modules, in 3d coordinates.
geometry_msgs/PoseWithCovariance pose
geometry_msgs/TwistWithCovariance twist
soccer_vision_attribute_msgs/Robot attributes

RobotArray.description: An array of robots with a header for global reference.
RobotArray.raw:
# An array of robots with a header for global reference.
# This msg type is used to publish all filtered robots from modelling modules.

std_msgs/Header header
soccer_model_msgs/Robot[]  robots
